title: Get the automatic messages for a Business Account
content:
Use this endpoint to retrieve the automatic messages for a Business Account. ## Before you start Because of the sensitive nature of direct message data, TikTok has implemented a higher level of due diligence for developers that will process direct messages on behalf of Business Account users. Ensure that you [have completed the necessary data security and privacy reviews and obtained access to Business Messaging API](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184145137922) before calling this endpoint. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/get/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|A short-term access token authorized by the TikTok Business Account owner.
For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type.
Allowed format: `application/json`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | business_id {Required}| string | Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.

Pass the value of the `open_id` field returned in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945#item-link-Obtain%20a%20short-term%20access%20token) to this field. | | auto_message_type{Required} | string | The type of automatic message.

Enum values:
  • `WELCOME_MESSAGE`: welcome message. A welcome message is a message that is automatically sent to a user when they start a direct message conversation with you. Each Business Account can have up to one welcome message.
  • `SUGGESTED_QUESTION`: suggested question. A suggested question is a frequently asked question displayed at the beginning of a chat. When the user selects a suggested question, the user will automatically receive the corresponding preset answer. Each Business Account can have up to three suggested questions.
  • `CHAT_PROMPT`: chat prompt. A chat prompt is an interactive button displayed above the input box. When users tap a chat prompt, the system will automatically generate a corresponding question for users to start the conversation. Each Business Account can have up to six chat prompts.
| | auto_message_id | string | The ID of the automatic message. | ``` ### Example #### Retrieve the welcome message for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/get/?business_id={{business_id}}&auto_message_type=WELCOME_MESSAGE' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` #### Retrieve the suggested questions for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/get/?business_id={{business_id}}&auto_message_type=SUGGESTED_QUESTION' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` #### Retrieve the chat prompts for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/auto_message/get/?business_id={{business_id}}&auto_message_type=CHAT_PROMPT' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| business_id | string | Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account. | #| operation_status | string | The status of the automatic message.

Enum values:
  • `ENABLE`: The automatic message is turned on.
  • `DISABLE`: The automatic message is turned off.

If you want to turn on or turn off an automatic message, use [/business/message/auto_message/status/update/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184596566017). | #| auto_messages | object[] | The list of automatic messages. | ##| auto_message_id | string | The ID of the automatic message. | ##| auto_message_type | string | The type of automatic message.

Enum values:
  • `WELCOME_MESSAGE`: welcome message. A welcome message is a message that is automatically sent to a user when they start a direct message conversation with you.
  • `SUGGESTED_QUESTION`: suggested question. A suggested question is a frequently asked question displayed at the beginning of a chat. When the user selects a suggested question, the user will automatically receive the corresponding preset answer.
  • `CHAT_PROMPT`: chat prompt. A chat prompt is an interactive button displayed above the input box. When users tap a chat prompt, the system will automatically generate a corresponding question for users to start the conversation.
| ##| audit_status | string | The review status of the automatic message.

Enum values:
  • `REVIEWING`: The automatic message is pending review.
  • `APPROVED`: The automatic message has been approved.
  • `REJECTED`: The automatic message has been rejected.

Note:

  • If the `audit_status` of the automatic message is `REJECTED`, you cannot update the automatic message by using [/business/message/auto_message/status/update/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184596566017).
  • If `audit_status` of the message is `REVIEWING`, you need to wait for some time before rechecking the review status. The exact waiting time may vary depending on the content and other factors, but normally ranges from a few seconds to 2-3 hours.
| ##| welcome_message | object | Returned only when `auto_message_type` is `WELCOME_MESSAGE`.

Information about the welcome message. | ###| content | string | The text of the welcome message.

Note: If you enable the welcome message for a Business Account for the first time, the default welcome message will be: `"Hi there,\nThanks for contacting {{display_name}}! Feel free to ask a question here or leave us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.\n\nThank you!"` | ##| suggested_question | object | Returned only when `auto_message_type` is `SUGGESTED_QUESTION`.

Information about the suggested question. | ###| question | string | A frequently asked question to help users start a conversation. | ###| answer | string | The preset answer that will be automatically sent when a user selects the question. | ##| chat_prompt | object | Returned only when `auto_message_type` is `CHAT_PROMPT`.

Information about the chat prompt. | ###| title | string | The name of the prompt button that is displayed above the input box. | ###| content | string | The corresponding question for the prompt that the system automatically generates for users to start the conversation when users tap the chat prompt. | ``` ### Example #### Retrieve the welcome message for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "operation_status": "ENABLE", "auto_messages": [ { "audit_status": "APPROVED", "welcome_message": { "content": "{{content}}" }, "auto_message_type": "WELCOME_MESSAGE", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}" } ], "business_id": "{{business_id}}" } } (/code) ``` #### Retrieve the suggested questions for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "auto_messages": [ { "auto_message_type": "SUGGESTED_QUESTION", "audit_status": "APPROVED", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "suggested_question": { "question": "{{question}}", "answer": "{{answer}}" } }, { "auto_message_type": "SUGGESTED_QUESTION", "audit_status": "APPROVED", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "suggested_question": { "question": "{{question}}", "answer": "{{answer}}" } }, { "auto_message_type": "SUGGESTED_QUESTION", "audit_status": "APPROVED", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "suggested_question": { "question": "{{question}}", "answer": "{{answer}}" } } ], "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "operation_status": "ENABLE" } } (/code) ``` #### Retrieve the chat prompts for a Business Account ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "auto_messages": [ { "auto_message_type": "CHAT_PROMPT", "audit_status": "APPROVED", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "suggested_question": { "title": "{{title}}", "content": "{{content}}" } }, { "auto_message_type": "CHAT_PROMPT", "audit_status": "APPROVED", "auto_message_id": "{{auto_message_id}}", "suggested_question": { "title": "{{title}}", "content": "{{content}}" } } ], "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "operation_status": "ENABLE" } } (/code) ```
